story: As a shopper, I want to add products to my cart, view cart contents, adjust quantities, and remove items, so that I can manage what I want to purchase.

cases.title: Add a product to the cart and verify cart badge update
steps: Navigate to the homepage
Locate the first product card
Click the '+ Add' button on the product card
Observe the button text changes to '✓ Added'
Check the cart badge in the navigation bar

cases.title: Open cart drawer and verify cart contents
steps: Ensure the cart has at least one item
Click the cart pill in the navigation bar
Observe the cart drawer slides open
Check the list of products in the cart drawer
assertions: The cart drawer should be visible
The cart drawer should list all added products with name, price, and quantity

cases.title: Increase product quantity in the cart
steps: Open the cart drawer
Locate the product in the cart
Click the '+' button to increase the quantity
assertions: The product quantity should increase by 1

cases.title: Decrease product quantity in the cart
steps: Open the cart drawer
Locate the product in the cart
Click the '-' button to decrease the quantity
assertions: The product quantity should decrease by 1
If the quantity reaches 0, the product should be removed from the cart

cases.title: Remove a product from the cart
steps: Open the cart drawer
Locate the product in the cart
Click the delete button to remove the product
assertions: The product should be removed from the cart
The cart badge should update accordingly

cases.title: Verify empty cart state
steps: Ensure the cart is empty
Open the cart drawer
assertions: The cart drawer should display an 'empty cart' message
The checkout button should be disabled

cases.title: Proceed to checkout with items in the cart
steps: Ensure the cart has at least one item
Open the cart drawer
Click the 'Proceed to Checkout' button
